temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A hand holds up a Hong Kong ID card for a man named Wong On-sang. The card is encased in a clear plastic sleeve, which is attached to a blue lanyard. The card is slightly worn, with handwritten notes and stamps visible on it. (Storyline: The scene introduces a key piece of information: the identity of a character, Wong On-sang, through his official Hong Kong ID card.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous electronic hum begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) A man in a light blue shirt and striped tie looks down with a serious, concerned expression. He holds the ID card and a blue lanyard, examining them intently before turning his head to the side. (Storyline: The man's serious expression and the act of examining the ID card suggest he is investigating or confirming the identity of the person on the card.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, tense electronic tone is added to the ominous hum, increasing the suspense.)
